title: Analytics Report
description: Reads Google Analytics data and creates a structured report with insights and recommendations.

nodes.title: Report Details
nodes.prompt: Ask the user: what report do they need? Suggest: (A) Monthly traffic and engagement report, (B) Content performance (top posts), (C) Traffic source analysis, (D) Custom (let them describe). Also ask for the date range.

nodes.title: Read Analytics
nodes.prompt: Read GA4 data for the requested report type and date range. Get traffic, engagement, source, and conversion metrics. Cross-reference with past reports.

nodes.title: Analyze & Report
nodes.prompt: Write a structured report: summary, traffic analysis, content performance, recommendations, open questions. Use the analytics data. Label all metrics with source and date range.

nodes.title: Review Report
nodes.prompt: Show the report draft to the user. Ask: (A) Approve and save as file, (B) Request revisions (let them specify), (C) Export differently.

nodes.title: Save Report
nodes.prompt: Save the approved report as a structured file with metadata. Include date range, report type, and key findings summary.
